title: chamaemelum chamomilla
intro: Chamaemelum chamomilla, also known as German chamomile, is a flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and calming effects. The health benefits of German chamomile include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation, and relieving digestive issues such as irritable bowel syndrome. German chamomile can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, essential oils, and infusions, which can be used to promote a good night's sleep and soothe skin irritations.
